creator: yamagi@yamagi.org
text:
Created attachment 179868
Deprecates sysutils/jail2

sysutils/jail2 provides an alternative rc script for starting jails through /etc/jail.conf. That functionality has been in base since FreeBSD 10.0. Now that FreeBSD 9.3 is EOL the port is no longer needed. Deprecate it and set 2017-04-01 as expiration date.
